extra_model_fields.expected_outcome: GeoJSON preview available for independent verification; rubric item ri_1 should pass once per-feature computed fields and provenance are present and match memo claims.
extra_model_fields.notes_for_worker: Focus on ensuring the GeoJSON is discoverable by the grader/verifier tooling (artifact_content_previews). Do not change the substantive calculations already documented in memo.md; only add or expose the GeoJSON with matching property names and provenance.
verification_steps_after_revision: Confirm artifact_content_previews contains attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (or attempts/revised/... as appropriate).
Confirm deterministic precheck still passes for presence of required deliverables.
Confirm model/verifier can open and parse GeoJSON; re-run grader to obtain semantic verification.
If any field name mismatches are detected by grader, correct names to exactly match memo provenance strings.

planned_changes: Add [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] to the artifacts directory (if not already present) and ensure it is committed so previews include it.

Populate each feature's properties with the exact required fields: original inputs (elevation, slope, flood_depth, road_distance_m), slope_flag (boolean), depth_flag (boolean), excluded (boolean), distance_score (numeric or null for excluded), composite_score (numeric or null for excluded), final_decision (string: 'proceed' or 'exclude'), provenance (string matching memo row citation), and location_status ('needs_review' if geometry null).
If geometries are unknown, explicitly set geometry:null for each feature and include location_status:'needs_review' in properties.
Update actual_outputs.json to reference the GeoJSON and include its content hash so artifact_content_previews tooling surfaces the file.

Run the validation step used in the trace (node parse or similar) to confirm the GeoJSON parses and appears in artifact_content_previews, and capture a short preview so the grader/verifier can inspect it.
Resubmit the attempt (161-revised) and include a short note in memo.md confirming that the GeoJSON was added and listing the property schema and provenance mapping.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The memo documents rules, inputs, calculations, and decisions clearly and reproducibly. However the flood_risk_cells.geojson artifact (claimed in outputs/trace) was not available in the provided content previews, preventing independent verification of per-feature computed properties (distance_score, composite_score, final_decision, etc.). Because of the missing GeoJSON preview the submission received partial credit; add the GeoJSON (with exact property names and provenance) and ensure it is exposed in artifact previews to pass verification.
